overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban environment. The player moves from a neon-lit covered pedestrian arcade through a service corridor into a bright open plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, then continues along city sidewalks and crosses a colorful intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian shopping arcade with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered pedestrian walkway, passing various storefronts and neon signs

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: red structural steel beams with teal accents forming a covered roof over the pedestrian walkway
illuminated storefront sign with green neon lettering
large rectangular concrete columns supporting the overhead structure
green industrial waste bins lined along the left wall
large illuminated screen displaying colorful food advertisement

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a covered urban pedestrian arcade. The environment features a distinctive red and teal structural roof overhead, neon storefront signs including one for 'MARK 24', and concrete support pillars. Moderate pedestrian traffic moves in both directions along the concrete sidewalk, with various digital advertisements visible on the right wall.

events.description: approaching bright exit from dark service corridor, increasing light levels

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow service corridor toward a bright exit, passing a worker handling cargo

notable_agents.action: worker in yellow safety vest pushing a cart loaded with cardboard boxes

entered.detail: closed metal security shutter with ventilation grilles
stack of brown cardboard shipping containers on a pallet
dark industrial walls with utility panels and minimal lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a darker, narrower service corridor with industrial aesthetics. A worker in a safety vest is seen pushing boxes near a metal roll-up door. The camera moves toward a bright exit at the far end, with lighting gradually increasing as the open exterior approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with outdoor seating and skyscrapers

events.description: exits covered service corridor into bright open urban plaza with direct sunlight
emerging from shadow into full direct sunlight, dramatic increase in brightness

agents.ego_description: walking out into the open plaza, looking around at the towering skyscrapers and urban landscape

entered.detail: large white patio umbrellas shading outdoor dining tables
tall palm trees lining the plaza area
towering futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers with holographic advertisements
large floating holographic advertisement for Orbital Air with red neon text
concrete barriers topped with barbed wire fencing along the street edge
raised concrete roadway structure crossing above the street level

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the dark corridor into a bright, open urban plaza bathed in midday sunlight. The scene reveals towering futuristic skyscrapers adorned with massive holographic advertisements, including one for 'Orbital Air'. Palm trees and outdoor cafe seating line the walkway, while concrete barricades separate the pedestrian area from the street. The transition from enclosed neon-lit space to open sunlit plaza creates a dramatic atmospheric shift.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with digital billboards and crosswalk

events.description: crossing colorful pedestrian crosswalk with red and yellow striped pattern

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and crossing the colorful intersection crosswalk toward a building entrance

notable_agents.action: woman in white dress walking ahead on the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall vertical digital screen displaying animated geisha face with blue hair
pedestrian crossing with distinctive red and yellow striped pattern
multi-story building with glass facade and ground-level commercial space
tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the walk along a city sidewalk toward a colorful crosswalk. A prominent digital billboard displaying an animated geisha face dominates the left side. The camera crosses the distinctive red and yellow striped crosswalk, passing other pedestrians, and approaches a modern building entrance. The street features traffic lights, concrete barricades, and scattered vehicles in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a vibrant, neon-lit pedestrian arcade into a dim industrial corridor that leads toward a bright urban exterior. It begins by gliding through a covered walkway characterized by a red and teal structural roof, passing concrete pillars and glowing storefront signs like Mark 24 amidst a flow of pedestrians. As the camera moves forward, the open arcade narrows and shifts into a darker service corridor with a gritty industrial aesthetic. The scene then passes a worker in a safety vest maneuvering boxes near a metal roll-up door, while the lighting gradually intensifies. The movement concludes as the camera pushes toward a brilliant white light at the far end of the corridor, signaling the transition into the open city.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dark, enclosed corridor into a sprawling, sun-drenched futuristic metropolis. It begins by emerging from the shadows into a bright urban plaza, where the atmosphere shifts dramatically as towering skyscrapers and massive holographic advertisements, including one for Orbital Air, come into view. As the camera moves past palm trees and outdoor cafe seating, the scene expands along a city sidewalk lined with concrete barricades. The perspective then shifts toward a vibrant intersection dominated by a digital billboard of an animated geisha face before finally crossing a red and yellow striped crosswalk toward a modern building entrance.
